_comment: Pinned LXGW WenKai Lite release subsetted to GB2312 (6763 Hanzi) + CJK punctuation/fullwidth. approxBytes is the observed subset size (reference only); sizeCapBytes is the upper bound enforced by the fetch CLI. sourceUrl/sha256 pin the TTF; licenseUrl/licenseSha256 pin the OFL.txt to the same immutable v1.522 tag. To update, change version + the four pinned fields from the official lxgw/LxgwWenKai-Lite release, then run bun run fetch:cjk-font.
